sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_PWDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USERID = #id#
SELECT lang FROM TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND userID = #userID#
SELECT timeZone FROM TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND userID = #userID#
SELECT tenant_id FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE property_name = 'DomainName' AND property_value = #DOMAIN_NAME#
SELECT tenant_id tenantId, server_name serverName FROM TBL_TENANT_SERVERNAME
SELECT tenant_id tenantId, tenant_name tenantName FROM TBL_TENANT
SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND UPPER(property_name) = #property#
SELECT property_name, property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #property_name#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USER_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE = #property_value# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #property_name#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND userID = #userID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT property_value FROM TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG LIMIT 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_company_config` ( `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `PROPERTY_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `PROPERTY_VALUE` varchar(2000) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`COMPANY_ID`,`PROPERTY_NAME`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
sqlMap.select: SELECT property_value FROM TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND UPPER(property_name) = #property#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE = #propertyValue# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #propertyName#
DELETE FROM TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #propertyName#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAIL FROM JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION LIMIT 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION ADD MAIL VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT ORDERBY FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER LIMIT 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ADD ORDERBY VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT ipno FROM TBL_ACCESS_IP LIMIT 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_access_ip` ( `IPNO` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `IPADDRESS` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `ACCESS` varchar(10) DEFAULT 'YES', `EXPLANATION` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`IPNO`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
sqlMap.select: SELECT accessno FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID LIMIT 1
SELECT domain_name FROM jmocha_distribution_sub LIMIT 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `jmocha_distribution_sub` ( `DOMAIN_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `USER_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `SUB_MAIL` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `SUB_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`,`SUB_MAIL`), KEY `foreign_keys_index` (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`), CONSTRAINT `FK_distribution_sub` FOREIGN KEY (`DOMAIN_NAME`, `USER_NAME`) REFERENCES `jmocha_distribution` (`DOMAIN_NAME`, `USER_NAME`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
sqlMap.select: SELECT MANUAL_FLAG FROM TBL_USERMASTER LIMIT 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_USERMASTER ADD MANUAL_FLAG VARCHAR(4) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT MANUAL_FLAG FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER LIMIT 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_DEPTMASTER ADD MANUAL_FLAG VARCHAR(4) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT sign_no FROM JMOCHA_MAIL_SIGNATURE_TEMPLATE LIMIT 1
SELECT JOBID FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER LIMIT 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `jmocha`.`jmocha_mail_signature_template` ( `sign_no` INT(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `content` LONGTEXT NULL, `displayname` VARCHAR(45) NULL, `displayname2` VARCHAR(45) NULL, `tenant_id` MEDIUMINT(5) NULL, `company_id` VARCHAR(45) NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`sign_no`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_user_jobmaster` ( `JOBID` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `TYPE` varchar(50) NOT NULL, `CN` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `DISPLAYNAME` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `DISPLAYNAME2` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `USEFLAG` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `SORT` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `CREATEDATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`JOBID`,`TYPE`,`COMPANYID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID=#tenantID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #confName#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO jmocha.tbl_tenant_config (tenant_id, property_name, property_value, description, config_name, regdate, config_type) VALUES (#tenantID#, #confName#, #property_value#, #description#, #config_name#, #regdate#, #config_type#)
